# Distinct country tag (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Distinct country tag. `json_extract_scalar()` pulls a scalar out of a JSON-in-text column (returns a string — wrap with `to_number` for math); `json_extract_*_array` extracts a JSON array for `arrayexpand`/`array_any`.

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | alter country = json_extract_scalar(payload, "$.geo.country"), tags_arr = json_extract_scalar_array(payload, "$.tags") | arrayexpand tags_arr | filter tags_arr != null | comp count() as occ by country, tags_arr | sort asc country, desc occ
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 12). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
